title: Rice Bowl
description: This pack replaces the Golden Apple and the Enchanted Golden Apple with a beautiful Rice Bowl.
body:
## Introducing Rice Bowl!
This texture pack changes the Golden Apple and Entchanted Golden Apple Texture to a more appealing looking Rice Bowl. Rice Bowl is for all of you who love rice, or are in like with east Asian food. This Texture pack **DOES NOT** add any chopsticks or similar.
## Support or Issues?
If you have any problems, feature suggestions or other you can join my helpful [Discord](https://discord.gg/XGxBGrJjkA).
